title: Width of enum members with explicit value is not detected.

features.name: enum with int base type and explicit values without explicit width
features.description: Code should include an enum typedef with int base type where enum members have explicit values but no explicit width specification
features.snippet: typedef enum int {IE0=0, IE1=1, IE2=2} implicitWidth_explicitValue;

features.name: enum values used in packed array concatenation
features.description: Code should include enum values used in a concatenation for assignment to a packed array

features.name: int enum with explicit values assigned to unpacked array
features.description: Code should include an int-based enum with explicit values assigned to an unpacked array parameter
